settings.heading: UNCENSORED, UNEDITED & UNFILTERED REVIEWS </br> OF THE OFFICIAL MEDICAL SAUNAS™

settings.text: To help you decide for yourself how effective Medical Saunas are, we have listed REAL, UNCENSORED, UNEDITED  reviews, emails and comments from customers who have paid for and used Medical Saunas.

settings.name: Kevin J.,
settings.colcontent: This Medical 6 plus sauna is everything advertised and more. Very well engineered and great looking as well. Easily assembled in an hour or so. Simple to use, quiet and roomy. If you are considering a sauna, do not hesitate to buy this one.

settings.name: Rachel A.,
settings.colcontent: Medical 6 Plus Best sauna ever!

settings.name: Tamara M.,
settings.colcontent: My body looks leaner, more muscular, and defined! They say each 30 min session you burn 600 calories. We’re in there for, at least, 45 min! Eventually, the sauna will heat up faster when its used often. Also, it doesnt consume a lot of power either. I LOVE IT! I recommend it to anyone who’s curious to take their healthy lifestyle to the next level, to the person who wants to lose weight or take their weight loss management to the next level, to the person who wants to find relaxation and stress free from life. GET ONE NOW! They are the new “in” in spa therapy, and they will only attract more popularity!!! This thing will pay for itself in a year!!!”

settings.name: Trevor F.,
settings.colcontent: What a way to start the day. Everyone should start their day in a Medical 6 plus Sauna. With my all my aches and pains this takes care of them first thing in the morning. I’m at a loss for words.

settings.name: Alan G.,
settings.colcontent: This Medical 6 Plus sauna is perfect for unwinding at the end of the day. The heat is even across the panels and the look is complimentary to wanting it seen and not hidden away. Everything fit perfectly and I assembled it easily enough by myself in 20 minutes from unpacking.

settings.name: Karen M.,
settings.colcontent: I love my Medical 6 Plus. After an easy assembly everything was in working order. Well made, very sturdy. Looks and works GREAT! Absolutely love this Sauna!

settings.name: Terry P.,
settings.colcontent: We have begun using the sauna and it is an unparalleled experience… I’ll be on my fourth session tonight and my husband on his second. We have already begun telling others about it!

settings.name: Michelle P.,
settings.colcontent: Our sauna arrived yesterday; it’s beautiful! My husband had it put together and in use within an hour of his arrival home from work. He loved it and can’t wait to use it again tonight when he gets home. Thanks again for making such a great product.

settings.name: Steph D.,
settings.colcontent: I purchased this Medical 6 plus sauna to warm cold winter bones as well as for some of the health benefits. It arrived when expected and was relatively easy to assemble.

settings.name: Lindsey O.,
settings.colcontent: I started using my sauna (6plus) right away after I installed it. I got in with my husband after he got off work and it seem to do wonders for both of us. That night we slept like babies. We were so relax, our muscles were weightless it seemed.

settings.name: Tim H.,
settings.colcontent: Great sauna for two people. Well made. Simple assembly. Impressed with fit, finish and functionality.

settings.name: Patty Y.,
settings.colcontent: From the time I ordered this to knowing exactly when it would arrive, to the delivery person placing it inside my garage, this was a wonderful experience. Although I have owned this for a short amount of time, I know it will be wonderful for a very long time. At this point, I couldn’t be happier with this purchase. - Owner of Medical 6 Plus

settings.name: Jennifer J.,
settings.colcontent:
I bought this sauna a few months ago and waited until now so I knew it would keep working perfectly…and it has. Super easy to assemble and flawless…exactly how it is described. Heats in about 20 mins. everything works great and it is used about 5 times a week at least.
well worth it!!

settings.name: Erin B.,
settings.colcontent: I think that my Medical 6 Plus is the best purchase I’ve made in the last 5 years.

settings.name: Ashley M.,
settings.colcontent: I just want you to know how much we LOVE it! I have been using it about 2-3 hours before I go to bed and I have been sleeping like a baby! I do have one question, though. What is the recommended number of times to use it per day? Would it be advantageous to use it once in the morning and once at night – or is that too much? Count us amoung your ecstatic customers!

settings.name: Laurie P.,
settings.colcontent: I have been an avid Sauna user for the past 20+ years and NEVER had I sweat as I did last night! I was so impressed, that I wanted to research the Pro’s and Con’s of this sauna -vs- other saunas and my findings were mind blowing, So glad my husband bought me this, he has customized my master bedroom closet and place this Sauna in it, It looks like it was custom made

settings.name: Courtney.,
settings.colcontent:
I am using the sauna 5/7 days/week. I just love it. There are now some mornings when I wake up and feel no pain in my neck and shoulders. I look forward to more days like this. I am someone who is always cold to the touch, and now my family tells me to ‘Go to your cabin’ whenever I complain of being cold. I enjoy my time in the cabin. Sometimes I listen to the radio and do Sudoku puzzles, other times I read a novel. I enjoy my quiet time.
Last weekend I did hours of gardening that would normally leave me pretty sore, but I went to ‘my cabin’ and I feel that it diminished the soreness that should have been present. Thanks for your great product and excellent customer service.

settings.name: Aaron M.,
settings.colcontent: No complaints. Great price, it is absolutely amazing. All the reviews were right, this is one of the best saunas I have ever used.

settings.name: Steven R.,
settings.colcontent: I’m sure you get this a lot but your Medical 6 Plus sauna is by far the single best health tool I have ever used. My whole family is using it and we are all seeing significant health benefits. In addition, I am seeing gains in muscle mass without any sort of weight training.

settings.name: Lindsey R.,
settings.colcontent:
Medical 6 plus
user here.My sister came to visit for about 2 weeks. We sat almost every night in the sauna and it was a great way to catch up on all of the months we were apart. She was obviously impressed with how the sauna made her feel and I think shes made up her mind on getting one herself.. It is truly a blessing to have and to share my Medical 6 plus.

settings.name: Lauren T.,
settings.colcontent: Wow I’m so happy I made the choice to get a Medical 6 plus sauna. This sauna is literally a life saver. I can’t believe I’ve gone all my life without one!. Thank you medical sauna!!

settings.name: Michelle S.,
settings.colcontent: We love using our sauna. The first benefit we noticed was clean, smooth, soft, healthy skin.(This is greatly helped by using a loofah in the shower after the sauna.) Currently, the sauna is helping us detox toxic minerals. Also, it is calming to the nervous system. I hate missing the sauna for more than a day or two, especially in winter.

settings.name: John L.,
settings.colcontent: No complaints. Great price, it is absolutely amazing. All the reviews were right, this is one of the best saunas I have ever used.

settings.name: Christina N.,
settings.colcontent:
I received the sauna and it is up and running. I am so happy with this sauna… VERY easy to put together and works great. It is everything Medical Sauna said it would be! I appreciate the great customer service and I feel good about my decision to purchase a sauna from your company.
Thanks again

settings.name: Diana C.,
settings.colcontent: Thank you for your wonderful sauna. I believe if every household had one, we would be a very healthy country.

settings.name: Jack L.,
settings.colcontent: What a great product. The medical 6 Plus is very much worth the money.

settings.name: Rich G.,
settings.colcontent: As others have pointed out, the sauna is very well made, relatively easy to install (definitely requires two people) and is a pleasure to use.

settings.name: Kimberly A.,
settings.colcontent: We put our sauna together with no problems. Have used it and love it. We don’t know how we did without one all these years! Before purchasing our sauna, I had researched extensively by going to several sites that sold them and often not quite impressed with what was offered, however, on the day I found Medical Sauna I was both impressed with the looks, warranty, and wealth of information I got. I knew we would be buying our sauna from you.

settings.name: Nathan P.,
settings.colcontent:
Last night I used it for the 5th straight day. Be careful and work your self up slowly.
It is awesome so far. The panels just soak your skin with luxuriant heat.
The only thing I can say is that I wish I had gotten it sooner!
My wife and I wanted a place to relax and unwind and this is the answer.

settings.name: Meg C.,
settings.colcontent: Medical 5 is definitely not what I expected. I have always thought of all saunas as a really comfortable way to heat up and relax but I never imagined that I can actually feel better after it. It blew me away! After a few sessions I can already tell I’ve been in a much better mood. It works better than any other sauna I have tried in the past.

settings.name: Neelima H.,
settings.colcontent: I had been buying sessions at a local spa when I decided to look into purchasing one myself, so I copied all the info on the one at the spa and went looking to buy the same one. I figured since there are so many on the market why not buy the same brand you have used and liked so that’s what I did. Last week I ordered it online and with in a couple of days it was here!!! incredible. Then in less than one hour it was all but together and ready for use. I could not be happier, first of all I found the very best price and also the service was great.

settings.name: Lauren T.,
settings.colcontent: Wow I’m so happy I made the choice to get a Medical 6 plus sauna. This sauna is literally a life saver. I can’t believe I’ve gone all my life without one!. Thank you medical sauna!!

settings.name: Andrea Y.,
settings.colcontent: I ordered a sauna and it continues to be a great treasure in my life. I ordered it mainly for a skin condition, which is nearly full healed now, thanks primarily to the sauna, which has proved a greater therapy than all the dietary and natural topical treatments put together. Please let me say thanks, many times over, and I wish you a very happy upcoming holiday season.

settings.name: Pete D.,
settings.colcontent:
The best there is.
If you haven’t ordered one, order one now. You won’t regret it.

settings.name: Molly I.,
settings.colcontent: “Took care of the shoulder pain so no more cortisone injections! Mom’s back pain way better! Skin clearer! AND AWESOME SLEEP! less snoring, less tossing around at night but amazingly less pain throughout my body. I use a mini ipod with my relaxing music so it’s a great de-stressor after work. I love this unit so much and I’m able to breathe easily in this larger unit as opposed to the one person sauna I’ve had in the past. Buy this…you won’t regret.”

settings.name: Mark H.,
settings.colcontent: I have never felt better mentally or physically. As a long time user of Medical Spas, my sleep has gotten so much better. I don’t wake up during the night anymore. I even got my parents to buy one for themselves after they tried mine a few times. I advise anybody to get this sauna. So happy to have it.

settings.name: Nicole T.,
settings.colcontent: My sauna is up and running as of last night and I can’t tell you how thrilled I am. One of my massage clients had the privilege of using it today even before I did. As soon as she left I was in it and I’m as impressed as she was – I’m pretty confident you will be hearing from her soon.

settings.name: Kristen R.,
settings.colcontent:
You know, it’s been I think like three weeks since our sauna arrived and I apologize that I’ve yet to sit down and tell you “thank you” SO much for providing such an incredible product! Until yesterday, I had not missed even ONE day of relaxing in this gorgeous sauna…and since I did miss yesterday, you can bet that it’s warming up right now as I type this to you.
You were so helpful as I took so long making my decision. This is truly a beautifully built piece of furniture. All I can say is that the design is absolutely ingenious. I’m amazed that I set the temp and timer, and then I make some tea…I usually wait about 15 minutes, get in and within another 10 -15 minutes I am sweating like crazy. I’ve been staying in between 40 and 60 minutes. It is glorious. I just really want you to know how thrilled I’ve been with the sauna.

settings.name: David C.,
settings.colcontent: My favorite part is literally how much sweat comes from my body. It says that the toxins from my body are escaping because of that sweat but I wasn’t sure if this was true. I asked my doctor and she said this is the case. It makes me feel like I got more from this sauna than I ever would have expected. Awesome!

settings.name: Joseph S.,
settings.colcontent: I’ve come to enjoy the ritual of the sauna. After my 20 minutes zipped up whatever stresses I feel in me dissolve and I am calm. I follow with a shower beginning with lukewarm water and finishing with a cold blast that makes my skin feels brand new.

settings.name: Andrea B.,
settings.colcontent: I am so happy with this purchase. I have wanted a Sauna because of the health benefits so I was searching for great reviews and price. I was also concerned with size and this was perfect for my small extra room. The design is simple and should be easy for most to put together. Delivery was fast and the customer service was there to help. I am enjoying the sauna daily and the heat is just right and adjustable. I am so glad that I did my research and got this sauna.

settings.name: Renee A.,
settings.colcontent: My muscles were very tight…I did yoga the day before and it feels great…the regular saunas at the gym make me uncomfortable…I’ve had chronic issues with my back for 15 years…right now I feel very loose and all I did was sit in the sauna for five minutes…it’s pretty amazing…I love it!
